_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = min(max(steps_per_epoch // 2, 1), max(total_steps // 10, 1))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step_idx: int) -> float:\\n        if step_idx < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step_idx + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step_idx - warmup_steps) / float(max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1))\\n        cosine = 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * cosine\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed 256-step budget more effectively by increasing batch size, switching to AdamW at a higher learning rate, and adding a warmup-plus-cosine schedule tied directly to the actual step budget.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\",\"indexing\",\"micro\"]}"}}
